blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 31 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
